prompt: Add support for affine temperature-scale conversions to sympy.physics.units so that convert_to can translate between Celsius, Fahrenheit and Kelvin using their offset (not just multiplicative) relationships. Wire it through the existing convert_to / Quantity machinery. Keep the public API and all existing unit behavior working.

Extend sympy.polys so that Poly() and the construct_domain machinery accept and correctly infer a domain for coefficients that are Python Fraction and Decimal instances, mapping them to the appropriate QQ/RR domain. Integrate with the existing construct_domain path. Keep all existing polynomial construction working.

Add automatic simplification of chained comparisons in sympy.core.relational so that a Relational built from an already-Relational argument (e.g. comparing a Boolean-valued relation) is normalized consistently. Integrate with Relational.__new__ / _eval_simplify. Keep all existing relational behavior working.

Add a helper to sympy.functions.elementary.piecewise that folds nested Piecewise in the argument of elementary functions (exp, log, sinh) into a single Piecewise, and use it during evaluation. Keep all existing Piecewise and elementary-function behavior working.
